description: Pen trials or a perhaps a note in Arabic with an unusually cut reed pen that had two contact points at various places throughout the text. Medieval-era. Requires further examination. The verso was reused for piyyūṭ according to FGP.
description_he: תרגילי כתיבה או פתק בערבית בעט עשוי קנה עם שתי נקודות מגע; גב שומש לפיוט
